features: GENTLE AND NOURISHING - Baby Dove Rich Moisture Head to Toe Wash is designed for the delicate skin and hair of newborns. This hypoallergenic gentle formula offers a soothing, nourishing bath experience, ideal for daily use. It keeps baby's skin and hair soft whilst providing a comforting and calming cleanse.

SKIN AND HAIR HYDRATION - This baby wash is formulated with 100% skin-natural nutrients to maintain the natural moisture of your baby's delicate skin and hair. It cleanses whilst also providing the necessary hydration. Our caring baby bath formula, created without parabens, phthalates, SLS, or SLES, ensures that our nutrients are identical to those naturally found in skin.

TEAR-FREE BATHING - Understanding the sensitivity of baby's eyes, this wash is made with a tear-free formula, ensuring a joyful and comfortable bath time. Our gentle and safety-tested formula is dermatologically and paediatrically tested, making it gentle on the eyes and reducing the likelihood of tears. This makes bath time a pleasant experience for both baby and parent.

DELICATE FRAGRANCE - Infused with a mild and delicate fragrance, this wash leaves baby smelling fresh and clean. The subtle scent is carefully chosen to be gentle and pleasing, adding to the comforting experience of bath time.

PRODUCT DETAILS - Included are 3 bottles of Baby Dove Rich Moisture Head to Toe Wash, each containing 400ml. This wash is suitable for daily use on newborns and older, offering a balanced and gentle cleansing experience. Its planet-friendly packaging reflects a commitment to caring for today's world.
description: Product Description Baby Dove Rich Moisture Hypoallergenic Wash gently cleanses and nourishes baby's sensitive skin, helping replenish skin essential nutrients lost during bath time. Pediatrician-recommended and dermatologist-tested, be assured that this tear-free and hypoallergenic baby wash gives baby's skin the complete care it needs. Support Skin's Natural Health This baby wash is made with 100% skin-natural nutrients to help skin retain its natural moisture. Give Baby Tip-To-Toe-Care Our Baby Dove Rich Moisture range provides gentle moisturizing care for baby's skin, scalp, and hair. Gentle On Baby's Skin Our ultra-gentle, rich moisture baby wash is made without parabens, phthalates, sulfates and dyes. Care For The Planet As part of our commitment to reducing plastic waste, Baby Dove bottles are made from 100% recycled plastic.
